name: Killua
description:
◇---Dreamcore---◇

Have you ever imagined opening a door that normally leads to a storage closet... only for it to open into a strange liminal space instead?

A place that feels like it shouldn't exist.

Well, today that door opened.

Killua was the one who turned the handle — but it happened in your apartment.

If you have ideas for expanding or improving the concept, feel free to share them! (I dont speak english so I used gpt as translator;)

Song —

"I'd rather sleep — Kero Kero Bonito"

"Something for your M.I.N.D. — Superorganism"
creator: Kwakshn
